zh.lifeSummary: 當Pernel Topping於大約1230年出生在英國時，她的父親Henry Topping31歲，母親Mrs Henry Topping54歲。她和Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1283年在英國達勒姆達勒姆享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pernel Topping于大约1230年出生在英国时，她的父亲Henry Topping31岁，母亲Mrs Henry Topping54岁。她和Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1283年在英国達勒姆達勒姆享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Topping
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English topping(e) ‘hair on the head’, probably given to someone with a distinctive head of hair or forelock. See also Topp and Topham .
perhaps from an unrecorded Old English personal name Topping, a pet form of Topp. See also Topp .

variants.name: Tappin
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Tapping, from Old English Tæpping, a pet form of the Tæppa seen in placenames like Taplow. See also Tapp .

variants.name: Topham
meanings: nickname from Middle English Toppan, of uncertain meaning. The second element is perhaps Middle English pan(ne) ‘(crown of the) head’, while Top- could be derived from several different words. If from Middle English toppen ‘to shave (the head)’, then Toppan might have been a name for a barber who provided tonsures for the clergy. Alternatively, Top- might represent Middle English tup, top(pe) ‘ram, male sheep’, hence ‘ram-head’, or Middle English top(pe), Anglo-Norman French tupe ‘hair on the head, tuft of hair, forelock’, denoting someone with a distinctive head of hair.

variants.name: Topp
meanings: English: nickname, perhaps from Middle English top(pe), tope, Old English topp(a) ‘hair on the head; tuft of hair’, for someone with distinctive hair. Compare Topping . Alternatively, from Middle English top(pe), tope, Anglo-Norman French toup, side-forms of Middle English tup(pe) ‘ram, male sheep’. A third possibility is a relationship name from the Middle English personal name Top(pe), Tope, perhaps representing an unrecorded Old English Top(p) or Toppa, of uncertain origin, or else (especially in east and northern England) Old Norse Tōpi, Tupe; see Toop .

German: from Low German topp ‘point, tree top’, hence a topographic name from the location of the dwelling; alternatively, a metonymic occupational name or nickname from the same word in the sense ‘braid’.

nameMeanings.name: Pernel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Common medieval simplified form of   Petronel  , occasionally revived in modern times as a given name.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Pernel Topping was born about 1230, in England, her father, Henry Topping, was 31 and her mother, Mrs Henry Topping, was 54. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn. She died in 1283, in Durham, Durham, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pernel Topping est née environ 1230, à Angleterre, son père, Henry Topping, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs Henry Topping, avait 54 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn. Elle est décédée en 1283, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pernel Topping um 1230 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Topping 31 und ihre Mutter Mrs Henry Topping 54. Sie hatte mit Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1283 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Durham, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pernel Topping è nata il circa 1230 nel England, sua padre, Henry Topping, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mrs Henry Topping, aveva 54 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn. Morì nel 1283, nel Durham, Durham, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pernel Toppingが約1230年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Henry Toppingは31歳，母Mrs Henry Toppingは54歳であった。彼女はHumphrey Conyers Lord Sockburnとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1283年にイギリスダルハムダルハムで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pernel Topping(이)가 대략 1230년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Topping(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Henry Topping(은)는 54세였다. 그녀는 Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pernel Topping nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Topping, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Henry Topping, tinha 54 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn. Ela faleceu em 1283, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pernel Topping родилась около 1230 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Topping было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Henry Topping, 54. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn. Она умерла в 1283 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pernel Topping nació aproximadamente 1230, en Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Topping, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs Henry Topping, tenía 54 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Humphrey Conyers Lord Sockburn. Murió en 1283, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
